notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission — exactly what we want every learner producing. three_tests: applies all three explicitly to the facts (appropriateness — lower rungs exhausted over two raises and seven weeks; channels — through R. not around; proportion — critical-path slip before sign-off is sponsor-level), and names both failure modes (over-escalating around R. AND under-escalating into passivity) with why the note lands between them. ladder: names the rungs, selects sponsor-via-R. as the lowest rung that will actually move Vantage, rules out another round at our level and rules PMO/legal too far. packet: all five elements specific — dated missed deliverables, milestone+sign-off impact, what's been tried, one specific ask (recovery commitment by end of next week), three options with trade-offs. tone: performance-not-people register, no catastrophising, explicit forward test ('written every line assuming it gets forwarded'). channel_and_followthrough: declines the direct-to-CISO/T. Adeyemi path explicitly, routes the T. Adeyemi offer through R., commits to not re-sending the same flag ('this packet is the new content'), closes the record (RAID + status, thanks). Closes with two genuine uncertainties handed to R. for the call.
